extension.description: Preview local and Remote SSH video files in VS Code with metadata inspection, compatible cache generation, and FFmpeg-powered transcoding.
capabilities.virtualWorkspaces.descripti: Remote Video Preview requires direct filesystem access to invoke ffmpeg and ffprobe.
commands.openWithPreview.title: Open With Remote Video Preview
commands.showMetadata.title: Focus Video Metadata
commands.generateCompatibleCache.title: Generate Compatible Cache
commands.exportCurrentFrame.title: Export Current Frame
commands.showDebugLog.title: Show Debug Log
configuration.title: Remote Video Preview
configuration.ffmpegPath.description: Path or command name for the ffmpeg executable.
configuration.ffprobePath.description: Path or command name for the ffprobe executable.
configuration.autoTranscode.description: Automatically generate a compatible cache when the source video cannot be played directly.
configuration.preferredContainer.descrip: Preferred output container for generated compatible caches.
configuration.maxBitrateMbps.description: Target max bitrate for generated compatible caches.
configuration.cacheDirectory.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative directory for transcoded cache files. Leave empty to use the workspace cache folder beside the source video.
configuration.cleanupPolicy.description: When generated cache files should be deleted. Use retained to keep caches until the age or size limits trim them.
configuration.cacheMaxAgeHours.descripti: Delete retained cache files older than this many hours. Set to 0 to disable age-based cleanup.
configuration.cacheMaxSizeGb.description: Delete the oldest retained cache files when the cache folder grows beyond this size in GB. Set to 0 to disable size-based cleanup.
